message: ../testdata/hocon/subst-tokenize/st-err03-invalid-unicode-short.conf: 1: Expecting a value but got wrong token: '41"}' (Malformed hex digits after \u escape in string: '41"}') (if you intended '41"}' (Malformed hex digits after \u escape in string: '41"}') to be part of a key or string value, try enclosing the key or value in double quotes, or you may be able to rename the file .properties rather than .conf)
